title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mahindra Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahindra Logistics:
Mahindra Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
